subcodes.first_line: The traces of the Pen of love and purity have bestowed serenity upon the world and dispelled the gloom of tribulation from hearts and minds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آثار قلم محبت و صفا عالم را صفا داد و کدورات حوادث را از افئده و قلوب برداشت
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
